summary: Record the single bounded post-repair aggregate Vitest run: all repository unit and UI tests are green after the M4 additions and regression repairs.

decisions.decision: After repairing the two observed aggregate failures, run exactly one repository-wide Vitest retry and retain its complete count as evidence; no watch mode or repeated loop is used.
decisions.rationale: The owner requires literal zero findings and explicitly prohibited unbounded test cycles; a single bounded retry directly falsifies the prior failures.

testEvidence.criterion: The complete Vitest repository suite is green after the M4 changes and regression fixes.
testEvidence.test: Run the one bounded aggregate test command after the focused repair checks.

red.outcome: RED: 162 files ran; 1,243 of 1,245 tests passed and two regressions failed.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 162 passed (162); Tests 1245 passed (1245); Duration 19.26s.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
